value.reason: The page is a CLI reference for OpenAI Codex, clearly documenting it as a terminal/CLI tool (TUI launched via the `codex` command). The label "Codex CLI (terminal)" is directly supported by the page content (e.g., "Launch the terminal UI", TUI flags, the `codex` command). The description's claims are all accurate: it runs as a CLI/TUI in the terminal via the `codex` command; the `--remote` flag supports connecting to a remote app-server over WebSocket or Unix socket; and there is indeed no mention of an IDE plugin, web UI, or mobile surface in this page. The `--remote` mention in the description correctly reflects the page without overstating it as a separate "remote control" surface. The page documents this specific access-surface capability (terminal/CLI) rather than any of the adjacent capabilities listed.
